notes: Module 4 Therapist Integration beachhead — Clinical Partnership. Consent-gated briefs; therapist account lists linked clients who granted therapist_share. LifeOS consent foundation is a dependency.

steps.task: Create therapist_profiles, therapist_client_links, and session_briefs tables (IF NOT EXISTS) for Wellness Studio Module 4.
steps.spec: SQL only. Idempotent CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS for: therapist_profiles(id uuid PK default gen_random_uuid(), user_id bigint NOT NULL UNIQUE, display_name text, approach text, session_frequency text, focus_areas jsonb default '[]'::jsonb, crisis_contact text, created_at timestamptz default now()); therapist_client_links(id uuid PK default gen_random_uuid(), therapist_user_id bigint NOT NULL, client_user_id bigint NOT NULL, status text default 'pending', client_consented_at timestamptz, created_at timestamptz default now(), UNIQUE(therapist_user_id, client_user_id)); session_briefs(id uuid PK default gen_random_uuid(), client_user_id bigint NOT NULL, therapist_user_id bigint, period_start date, period_end date, brief_json jsonb NOT NULL, client_reviewed_at timestamptz, shared_at timestamptz, created_at timestamptz default now()). No DROP. No ALTER that destroys data.

steps.task: Therapist integration service: upsertTherapistProfile, linkClient, listLinkedClients, createSessionBrief, markBriefReviewed, shareBriefIfConsented.
steps.spec: ESM. Export createWellnessTherapistService({ pool, consentRegistry }). shareBriefIfConsented MUST call consentRegistry.hasConsent(clientUserId, 'therapist_share') and refuse without grant. Never return raw chat transcripts — only brief_json. Parameterised SQL only. No browser globals. @ssot docs/products/wellness-studio/PRODUCT_HOME.md

steps.task: Express surface for therapist profile, client links, and consent-gated brief share. Export registerWellnessTherapistRoutes(app, deps).
steps.spec: ESM export registerWellnessTherapistRoutes(app, deps) with deps={pool, requireAuth, consentRegistry}. Mount under /api/v1/wellness/therapist: POST /profile, GET /profile/me, POST /links, GET /clients (therapist|admin), POST /briefs, POST /briefs/:id/share. Share path uses shareBriefIfConsented. JSON only. No browser globals. @ssot docs/products/wellness-studio/PRODUCT_HOME.md
steps.last_error: route module not auto-registered — add {"path":"routes/wellness-therapist-routes.js","register":"<registerFn>","enabled":true} to config/auto-registered-product-modules.json so the endpoint actually mounts LIVE (built + deployed but unreachable = false done)

steps.task: Auto-register wellness therapist routes at boot without editing server.js.
steps.spec: Add {"path":"routes/wellness-therapist-routes.js","register":"registerWellnessTherapistRoutes","enabled":true} to modules[]. Preserve all existing entries. File must remain valid JSON.
